ohtani.title: Shohei Ohtani leads shutout win over Giants
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani fans eight over seven innings and the Dodgers hit back-to-back home runs in a 4-0 shutout win vs. the Giants

imanaga.title: Mike Yastrzemski hits go-ahead double in Braves' win
imanaga.blurb: Mike Yastrzemski comes up clutch with a go-ahead double in the 8th inning to back a lockdown bullpen performance in the Braves' 4-1 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Mike Yastrzemski hits go-ahead double in Braves' win
suzuki.blurb: Mike Yastrzemski comes up clutch with a go-ahead double in the 8th inning to back a lockdown bullpen performance in the Braves' 4-1 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Rafaela's pinch-hit, two-run HR lead Red Sox 3-1 win
yoshida.blurb: Ceddanne Rafaela's pinch-hit, two-run home run in the sixth lift the Red Sox to a 3-1 win over the Phillies

okamoto.title: Varsho hits a walk-off grand slam in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Daulton Varsho crushes a walk-off grand slam in the 10th, and Dylan Cease strikes out nine in the Blue Jays' win 5-3 over the Rays

murakami.title: Kelenic, Montgomery lead White Sox to 6-5 win
murakami.blurb: Jarred Kelenic drives in two and Colson Montgomery drives a home run to lead the White Sox to a 6-5 win over the Royals

matsui.title: Joey Ortiz leads Brewers to fifth straight win
matsui.blurb: Joey Ortiz clubs a home run and Brice Turang caps off a five-run 4th inning with a two-run double to surge the Brewers past the Padres, 6-4
